tweet.text:
I had to vent about Vandy’s HISTORIC upset over my #Alabama squad 🥲
@Wendys #WendysPartner https://t.co/M3VnP0mUFQ
RT @3xOptionShow: There's one word you can't say in Columbus and it starts with a "M". @WHoward_ had to learn quickly that one game shines…
RT @3xOptionShow: We (sorta) play rapid fire on the CFB Playoff contenders who got upset! 🤔 https://t.co/ihS2pcoGOw
RT @BNKonFOX: .@markingramII: certified gamer 🎮🔥 https://t.co/JUjBQakUTa
RT @3xOptionShow: Was #Alabama's upset loss to #Vandy bad? Yes. Reason to panic? NO! @MattLeinartQB https://t.co/vOcTwGaArf

RT @3xOptionShow: The standard is the standard for #OhioState...it's National Championship or bust 🏆
@Wendys #WendysPartner https://t.co/…
RT @3xOptionShow: Does #Alabama have any more room for error after getting upset against Vandy?? 🧐 https://t.co/onPI0TZMPS
RT @MattLeinartQB: RDT @markingramII

RT @3xOptionShow: When do we stop making excuses for the SEC?! 🤷‍♂️ @Wendys #WendysPartner https://t.co/jdHIpX1SyC

https://t.co/oGDAaYUW5O
Bro we need a miracle every week it shouldn’t be this way https://t.co/ZQ0JWiJHoQ
Great W but I’m not encouraged #RollTide
The contact balance! The stiff arm! The finish for the TD! Guess who? SKATTEBO https://t.co/qbElmQ2r9b
Gotta love football Saturdays 🤩😍 https://t.co/rq9KO2lods
Who put that garage there? #NissanHeismanHouse #NissanPartner https://t.co/M32Wa0MMul

WEEK 7️⃣‼️ SAY WHAT YOU WANT but you can’t say @BYUfootball @byuROC ain’t a bucket list stop if you love a football party! Hall of fame mascot @byu_cosmo was the star of the show and this was one of the best atmospheres @BNKonFOX has ever been to!
